Need help with team building for D-tide.
Can anyone help me with a basic understanding as to what should I keep in mind while building teams for d tide?
dtide is about managing your power budget across 5 teams
unlike other game modes where u are trying to build the strongest team
in dtide u need to find the highest combination of stages that you can clear with your whole account
which often means starving each individual team
how bad of a team can it get and still clear
can you clear without good wheels
etc
the worse you can make each team and still clear
the more clears you can do
which means higher score

Oh got it.
I would just like to clear it in the least difficulty for now.
I couldn't do it earlier because of low level therefore I fell one zone short.and only cleared 4 waves
for your account for example, i would minimally try to do all alert 3
because vortice solos one wave
arachne solos one wave
salvador thais solos one wave
daff horla solos one wave
and then last wave can use a borrow
so you can even clear alert 5
and you can probably push higher for some of them, like i think that vortice might be able to do alert 4-5
the lowest difficulty is very very very easy
here is a team that can beat alert 1
